name: AI-edit sample script
description: Reference edit-script artifact produced by the ai_edit miniKanren engine: builds a two-zone floor (lobby + server room) with a guard, a dog, a drone, two street/house NPCs, an undercover character, a keycard item and a consistent PBX on an empty level.
author: Jonathan D.A. Jewell <j.d.a.jewell@open.ac.uk>
